subcodes.title: Words to Mr and Mr C R Ashbee in March 1920
subcodes.first_line: First we must get rid of all glosses, Talmuds, codes of divinity, and clerical law. Get back to the revealed word of God where we can.
subcodes.subjects: @corruption and renewal; abandoning religious dogmas, @unity of governments; political unity, @changing and unchanging parts of religion, @twin Manifestations, @literal interpretation, @present and future calamities; war; universal convulsion, @universal peace; world unity
